behavior_trees.planner_output:
1. rotate_spot(90)
2. move_spot(10)
3. if obstacle_ahead is true:
   a. call_llm
   b. wait for new instructions from the LLM
   c. if new instructions include rotate_spot, execute rotate_spot(new_degrees)
   d. if new instructions include move_spot, execute move_spot(new_meters)
4. if not obstacle_ahead and target_ahead is true, finish_task; else, call_llm

Fallbacks:
- If at_goal is true, finish_task.
- If numeric next action is unclear, call_llm.

1. rotate_spot(90)
2. move_spot(5)
3. if obstacle_ahead is true:
   a. call_llm
   b. wait for new instructions from the LLM
   c. if new instructions include rotate_spot, execute rotate_spot(new_degrees)
   d. if new instructions include move_spot, execute move_spot(new_meters)
4. if not obstacle_ahead and obstacle_left is true:
   a. rotate_spot(-45)
   b. move_spot(2)
   c. if obstacle_ahead is true:
      i. call_llm
      ii. wait for new instructions from the LLM
      iii. if new instructions include rotate_spot, execute rotate_spot(new_degrees)
      iv. if new instructions include move_spot, execute move_spot(new_meters)
5. if not obstacle_ahead and obstacle_right is true:
   a. rotate_spot(45)
   b. move_spot(2)
   c. if obstacle_ahead is true:
      i. call_llm
      ii. wait for new instructions from the LLM
      iii. if new instructions include rotate_spot, execute rotate_spot(new_degrees)
      iv. if new instructions include move_spot, execute move_spot(new_meters)
6. if not obstacle_ahead and not obstacle_left and not obstacle_right and target_ahead is false, call_llm

Fallbacks:
- If at_goal is true, finish_task.
- If numeric next action is unclear, call_llm.

      i. call_llm

      iii. if new instructions include rotate_spot, execute rotate_spot(new_degrees)
      iv. if new instructions include move_spot, execute move_spot(new_meters)
5. if not obstacle_ahead and obstacle_right is true:
   a. rotate_spot(45)
   b. move_spot(2)
   c. if obstacle_ahead is true:
      i. call_llm
      ii. wait for new instructions from the LLM
      iii. if new instructions include rotate_spot, execute rotate_spot(new_degrees)
      iv. if new instructions include move_spot, execute move_spot(new_meters)
6. if not obstacle_ahead and not obstacle_left and not obstacle_right and target_ahead is false, call_llm

Fallbacks:
- If at_goal is true, finish_task.
- If numeric next action is unclear, call_llm.
